title: Workflow Syntax, Expressions, YAML, and Data Contracts · Workflow and Release Recall
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs workflow syntax, expressions, yaml, and data contracts from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the validated workflow data contract under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for validated workflow data contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Author name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, defaults, jobs, and job-level contracts with explicit supported syntax.
Control YAML scalars, booleans, quoting, multiline blocks, reserved-looking keys, indentation, and serialization boundaries.
Reason about expression literals, loose equality, coercion, truthiness, functions, object filters, fromJSON, and toJSON without leaking data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Workflow Schema Top Level · changed case · Review Ci Workflow Schema Top Level
steps.instruction:
review case — A review workflow parses YAML but treats false as text, expands a multiline value unsafely, uses an unavailable context, and accepts a misspelled input. Validate syntax, types, timing, shell boundaries, and a changed event fixture. Competency probe: Author name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, defaults, jobs, and job-level contracts with explicit supported syntax.

Which action demonstrates Ci Workflow Schema Top Level without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Ci Workflow Schema Top Level · changed case · Review Ci Workflow Schema Top Level.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for author name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, defaults, jobs, and job-level contracts with explicit supported syntax. For Ci Workflow Schema Top Level · changed case · Review Ci Workflow Schema Top Level, keep Ci Workflow Schema Top Level connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.
